历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 4886, 8030, 8224, 7686, and 6979 respectively. Overall, there is a trend of moving backward, with the best ranking in 2021 (4886), a significant shift to over 8000 in 2022-2023, a slight recovery to around 7000 in 2024-2025, and a baseline ranking of about 6979 in 2025, with a recovery of about 700 places in the last two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi science/physics category: 8 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 5 in 2025, and an increase to 6 in 2026, a 20% expansion compared to 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 79th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2026), with stable rankings in the 73-82 range in recent years. It is a top national language institution with high institutional level and brand recognition. In 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (declining admission positions for minor language majors), and in 2026, its reputation remains somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics public opinion), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 39th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-high exposure on short video platforms. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), highly related to the university's translation, English, and other admission majors. In 2026, it added cross-disciplinary majors such as Computer Science and Technology (digital intelligence technology/intelligent language technology), expanding its academic layout.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is 'generally wait-and-see' (2024), while computer/electronic information majors are relatively hot (2024 electronic information/communication, highly recommended). The university's physics category admission majors include Translation, English (Foreign Language Education), and Big Data Management and Application, with a combination of language and data science directions. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition within the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6979, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 (5 to 6) causing a backward shift in ranking, a significant increase of about 19.7% in local physics category candidates intensifying competition, and a somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing application enthusiasm, the main supply-demand elasticity value is about 7816. Considering that the actual push from candidate scale growth on competition is greater than the easing effect of enrollment expansion, the predicted minimum ranking is about 7766, with a range of 7266-8266.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7266), focus on reaching for the Translation major.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 6419, 762, 982, 1041, and 966 respectively. The ranking in 2021 was abnormally high (6419), then surged to 762 in 2022, and stabilized within the range of 762-1041 over the past four years, with a fluctuation of about 280 positions. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 966. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Shaanxi has been continuously expanding: 6 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and planned to increase to 17 in 2026, an expansion of about 21% compared to 2025, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 79th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), with a stable ranking range of 73-82 in recent years. It is a top-tier language institution nationwide, with high institutional level and brand recognition. In 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (declining admission positions for minor language majors), and in 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics public opinion), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It ranks 39th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as English, Translation, German, Spanish, Japanese, and Arabic, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of foreign language majors is in a 'generally wait-and-see' state (2024), with clear differentiation. Journalism and Communication majors were 'clearly discouraged' in 2023, but the university's Journalism and Communication majors intersect with the A+ discipline of Foreign Language and Literature, offering certain characteristics. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition within the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 966 in 2025, the expansion of about 21% in 2026 (14 to 17) causing a backward shift in ranking, the increase of about 17% in local history category examinees intensifying competition, and the somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing application enthusiasm, the supply-demand elasticity main value is approximately 1090. Taking into account that the actual push of competition from the growth in examinee numbers roughly offsets the expansion effect, and the somewhat negative reputation slightly shifts the ranking backward, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1060, with a range of 901-1219.
